title: Blue Dart is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Blue Dart is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Blue Dart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
